researched_category.notes: Zoho Cliq is a real-time messaging, collaboration, and UCaaS platform for teams, similar to Slack and Microsoft Teams.

one_liner.value: Team messaging and collaboration platform with channels, chat, video calls, bots, and integrations.

methods.notes: OAuth 2.0 is the only authentication method documented for the official Zoho Cliq REST API. Developers register a client in the Zoho API Console to get a Client ID and Secret. A 'Self Client' option exists for server-to-server OAuth flows (client credentials grant / authorization code grant). Incoming webhooks for bots also exist but are not a primary API auth method.

access.notes: Any developer can sign up for a free Zoho account at developer.zoho.com/signup and access the API Console to create OAuth credentials. Zoho Cliq has a free plan (up to 5 users). No evidence that API access requires a paid plan or admin approval. The API console is publicly accessible at api-console.zoho.com. A community thread states 'There is no usage limit on the API' (anti-DOS protections only), suggesting no plan-based API restrictions.

summary.value: Zoho Cliq has a comprehensive, publicly documented REST API (v3, with v2 still supported). The API covers chats, messages, threads, channels, bots, slash commands, message actions, functions, datastores, extensions, DND/mobile/user settings, keyboard shortcuts, reminders, scheduled messages, pins, stars, and more. It also supports incoming webhooks for bots. An OpenAPI Specification and Postman collection are available.

agent_interface.notes: Zoho provides an official MCP server for Cliq (Zoho Cliq MCP Server). It is documented at https://www.zoho.com/cliq/help/platform/zoho-cliq-mcp.html, with guides for connecting to Claude and other MCP clients. No dedicated Composio toolkit for Zoho Cliq was found, though a general Zoho (CRM-focused) toolkit exists on Composio.

rationale.value: Zoho Cliq has everything needed for an agent toolkit: a well-documented, broad REST API (v3), OAuth 2.0 authentication that developers can self-serve for free, and an official MCP server published by Zoho. There are no material blockers. The API is fully public, no paid plan or admin approval is required, and the scope covers all major collaboration features (messaging, channels, bots, threads, etc.).

s1.quote: Zoho Cliq's REST API is designed based on RESTful architecture principles... Zoho Cliq API uses the OAuth 2.0 protocol for authentication.
s1.title: Introduction | Zoho Cliq | API Documentation

s2.quote: The first step in using OAuth authentication is registering your app with the Zoho API console. Once you register your client, you will get a Client ID and Client secret for your application.
s2.title: Introduction to OAuth 2.0 | Zoho Cliq | API Documentation

s3.quote: You can sign up for free at https://developer.zoho.com/signup. Once you will be able to access the Zoho Developer Console, where you can manage your apps and credentials.
s3.title: How to Register a Zoho Developer App and Get OAUTH2 Credentials

s4.quote: Free Try Now Get Started - Messaging and channels, File storage, Meetings with screen share, Remote work, Chat export
s4.title: Cliq - Chat Pricing | Free Chat plans for all Teams size

s5.quote: According to Zoho Cliq API Documentation: 'We have system limitations just to protect from denial of service (DOS) attacks. There is no usage limit on the API'.
s5.title: Zoho Cliq API Rate Limit

s6.quote: The Zoho Cliq MCP Server brings your chats into the world of AI using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Any AI model or agent can use our official MCP server to access your Cliq data.
s6.title: Guide to Zoho Cliq's MCP Server

s7.quote: To access Zoho's resources through the Zoho Cliq APIs, you first need to register your application. Applications can be registered as one of the following client types: Server-based application, Client-based application, Mobile-based application, Non-browser based application, Self client.
s7.title: Register your application | Zoho Cliq | API Documentation

s8.quote: Connect better, work smarter: Your all-in-one UCaaS solution for modern teams. Messaging and channels, File storage, Meetings with screen share, Remote work, Chat export.
s8.title: Cliq - Chat Pricing | Free Chat plans for all Teams size

s9.quote: Link Claude with Zoho MCP to facilitate real-world workflows in Zoho Cliq through a secure and simple setup within your conversation window.
s9.title: Connect Zoho Cliq MCP to Claude

limitations: Could not find explicit mention of API rate limits on the official docs pages (only a community thread reference), but this is not a blocker.
No dedicated Composio toolkit for Zoho Cliq was found; the general Zoho toolkit on Composio appears CRM-focused. However, the official MCP server exists.
The pricing page does not explicitly state which plans include API access, but community sources and the existence of a free plan suggest no plan-based restriction.
